name: Social - SOLD Post
_security_notes: FUB webhook: HMAC-SHA256 signature verified (FUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET n8n var). Soft-fail on empty secret for initial setup.
agentEmail: allowlisted to known internal domains before use.
All FUB fields HTML-escaped before email interpolation.
Postgres queries: parameterized ($1) — no string interpolation into SQL.
Token format validated against UUID v4 regex before any DB call.
Confirmation page: AI content HTML-escaped in Code node before rendering.
Approval: GET shows read-only preview page. POST with single-use token publishes.
Content always read from Postgres server-side — never from query string.

messages.content: You write real estate social media posts for The Anchor Group in Palm Coast, Florida. Brand: Dolphins Not Sharks. Fair Housing compliant. SOLD posts celebrate the transaction and agent excellence. 50-120 words. End with: — The Anchor Group

=Write 2 SOLD post variations.
Property: {{$json.address}}, {{$json.city}}, FL
Sale Price: ${{$json.price}} | {{$json.beds}} bed / {{$json.baths}} bath
Agent: {{$json.agent}}

Write exactly 2 variations labeled CELEBRATORY: and GRATEFUL: on separate lines. Each 50-120 words.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO nightshift.social_drafts (id, workflow, address, tone, content, agent_email) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)

parameters.subject: =SOLD! Post ready — {{$json.address[0]}}
parameters.html:
=

Congratulations {{$json.agent[0]}} on the close!

Two post options are ready for {{$json.address[0]}}, FL. Click to preview — nothing posts until you confirm on the next screen.

{{$json.tone.map((tone,i)=>'' + tone + '').join(' ')}}

— Anchor Group AI | Nothing posts until you confirm.

parameters.query: SELECT id, tone, content, consumed FROM nightshift.social_drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE nightshift.social_drafts SET consumed=true, consumed_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND consumed=false RETURNING id, content, tone

parameters.responseBody:
✓ SOLD post published!

It's live on the Anchor Group Facebook page.

This approval link has already been used.

The post was already published, or the link expired.
